settings.description: Michelin's flagship all-season touring tire. Exceptional longevity with up to 130,000 km treadwear warranty and outstanding wet-road grip.
Award-winning winter tire engineered for Calgary's ice and packed snow. Superior braking performance at temperatures below -20°C.
Ultra-high performance all-season. Track-capable handling meets year-round traction — ideal for performance sedans and sports coupes.
Built for trucks and SUVs that work hard. Combines off-road capability with quiet, comfortable highway driving.

settings.subtitle: The world's most trusted tire brand. Michelin delivers premium safety, longevity, and performance across every category — from winter commuting to performance driving.
settings.cta_description: In-stock selection available. Same-day installation with professional mounting, balancing, and alignment.
